soal: I am a handcrafted object. I have a shape that looks like a human face. People wear me during performances.
I wear a uniform. My job is to protect people and keep order in society.
I am very quiet at night. People come to visit me on special occasions. I am a place for a very long rest.
Children love me for breakfast. I am often spread inside bread. I come in strawberry or grape flavour.
I am white and found in the sky. I bring rain. I can look like animals sometimes.
I have four legs and a flat surface. You eat your meals on top of me.
I live in the ocean. I have eight arms. I can change colour to camouflage.
I fly through the sky and carry hundreds of passengers. I have wings but I am not a bird.
I have keys but no locks. I have space but no room. You use me to type.
I have hands but I cannot clap. I tell you something important every minute.
I have pages but I am not a book. People read me every morning for news.
I have a screen. I fit in your pocket. You use me to call people.
I grow in the ground. I am red and round. People put me in salads.
I have a long neck and black and white keys. Music comes from me.
I am very fast. I run on tracks. I carry hundreds of passengers between cities.
I live in the forest. I am the king of the jungle. I have a mane.
I am round and made of leather. You kick me across a field.
I hold liquid. I have a handle. People drink coffee or tea from me.
I am made of paper. I have many rooms. People stay in me when they travel.
I am sharp. I am used in the kitchen. I cut vegetables and meat.
I am tall. I have leaves and roots. I provide shade and oxygen.
I am frozen water. I come from the sky in winter. No two of me are alike.
I have a shell. I carry my home on my back. I move very slowly.
I come in a bunch. I am yellow. Monkeys love me.
I am a source of light. I hang on the ceiling. I light up a room.
People write on me. I am flat and rectangular. I can be found in a notebook.
I keep things cold. I hum in the kitchen. You store food inside me.
I spin around. I keep you cool in summer. I have blades.
I am used in sport. I bounce. You throw or shoot me through a hoop.
I am a professional who flies to space. I wear a special suit.
